prompt:
Shot on 35mm film, Kodak Portra 400, soft fluorescent supermarket light, soft grain, Dutch tilted angle. A young Indonesian couple is caught in the middle of a hilarious grocery aisle disaster. The woman, in a simple white blouse and jeans, stands frozen with both hands over her mouth, her face a mix of shock and uncontrollable laughter—eyes wide, a snorting giggle escaping. The man, in a rumpled grey t-shirt and shorts, is tangled in a shopping cart that has tipped over, his legs comically in the air, a bag of chips exploding over his chest. Scattered groceries—oranges, instant noodles, a bottle of soy sauce—are rolling across the linoleum floor. One flip-flop has flown off his foot. The background is slightly cluttered with a "DISKON" sign, a shelf of snacks, and a security guard in soft blur looking unimpressed. A young Indonesian woman, authentic Indonesian appearance, natural facial proportions, subtle facial asymmetry, healthy hydrated skin with visible pores, slight uneven pigmentation, tiny acne marks, realistic T-zone shine, relaxed facial muscles, minimal everyday makeup. A young Indonesian man, warm medium skin tone, natural facial proportions, subtle facial asymmetry, healthy skin with visible pores. Realistic skin: visible pores, natural texture, no beauty filter. Slight motion blur on the rolling oranges, a faint warm light leak at the top edge. A stray cat tail peeks from behind the snack shelf at the bottom left corner. No filter.
dutch angle, stray cat tail --ar 9:16

Shot on 35mm film, Kodak Portra 400, soft fluorescent supermarket light, soft grain, Dutch tilted angle. A young Indonesian couple is caught in the middle of a hilarious grocery aisle disaster. The woman, in a simple white blouse and jeans, stands frozen with both hands over her mouth, her face a mix of shock and uncontrollable laughter—eyes wide, a snorting giggle escaping. The man, in a rumpled grey t-shirt and shorts, is tangled in a shopping cart that has tipped over, his legs comically in the air, a bag of chips exploding over his chest. Scattered groceries—oranges, instant noodles, a bottle of soy sauce—are rolling across the linoleum floor. One flip-flop has flown off his foot. The background is slightly cluttered with a "DISKON" sign, a shelf of snacks, and a security guard in soft blur looking unimpressed. promptZh:
使用 35mm 胶片拍摄，Kodak Portra 400，柔和的超市荧光灯，细腻颗粒，荷兰式倾斜角度。一对 年轻的印尼夫妇 正陷入一场 令人捧腹的超市货架灾难 之中。女子身穿简单的白色衬衫和牛仔裤，双手捂嘴僵在原地，脸上混合着震惊与无法抑制的笑意——双眼圆睁，正发出憋不住的笑声。男子身穿皱巴巴的灰色 T 恤和短裤，被翻倒的购物车缠住，双腿滑稽地翘在空中，一袋薯片在他胸前炸开。散落的杂货——橙子、方便面、一瓶酱油——正在油毡地板上滚动。他的一只人字拖飞了出去。背景略显杂乱，挂着一个“DISKON”标志，货架上摆满零食，一名保安在柔和的模糊中显得无动于衷。年轻的印尼女性，地道的印尼长相，自然的五官比例，细微的面部不对称，健康水润的皮肤，可见毛孔，轻微的肤色不均，细小的痘印，真实的 T 区油光，放松的面部肌肉，极简的日常妆容。年轻的印尼男性，温暖的中等肤色，自然的五官比例，细微的面部不对称，健康的皮肤，可见毛孔。真实的皮肤：可见毛孔，自然纹理，无美颜滤镜。滚动的橙子带有轻微动态模糊，顶部边缘有淡淡的暖色漏光。左下角零食货架后露出一截流浪猫的尾巴。无滤镜。
dutch angle, stray cat tail --ar 9:16
